title: Pushable
description: Defines what can push an entity between other entities and pistons.

is_pushable.title: Is Pushable
is_pushable.description:
Whether the entity can be pushed by other entities.

Sample values:
• allay: true

is_pushable_by_piston.title: Is Pushable By Piston
is_pushable_by_piston.description:
Whether the entity can be pushed by pistons safely.

Sample values:
• allay: true
